Explore available variables and parameters

var_explore.Rd

Explore available variables and parameters

Usage

var_explore(source = NULL, what = "sources", error_context = NULL)

Arguments

source

Data source to explore

what

What to explore ("sources", "variables", "resolutions")

error_context

Error context from var_get (if called from error handler)

Value

Prints helpful information

Examples

# Show available sources
var_explore()
#> 
#> ── Available data sources: ──
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> ── Climate Data: 
#> • worldclim: WorldClim 2.1 climate data (historical & CMIP6 future)
#> • chelsa: CHELSA climatologies v2.1 (historical, monthly, future)
#> • aridity: Global Aridity Index and Potential Evapotranspiration v3
#> • climatezones: Koppen-Geiger climate classification maps
#> 
#> ── Land Cover: 
#> • esalandcover: Global 1 km Land Cover (Lo Parrino et al. 2025)
#> • earthenvlandcover: EarthEnv Consensus Land Cover (Tuanmu & Jetz 2014)
#> 
#> ── Terrain & Topography: 
#> • topography: EarthEnv Topography (elevation, slope, aspect, roughness, etc.)
#> • cloudcover: EarthEnv Global Cloud Cover dynamics
#> 
#> ── Biodiversity & Habitat: 
#> • heterogeneity: EarthEnv Habitat Heterogeneity metrics
#> • protection: WDPA Protected Areas by IUCN category
#> 
#> ── Threats & Human Pressure: 
#> • spectre: SPECTRE ecosystem threat layers (mining, roads, fires, etc.)
#> • accessibility: Global Accessibility Indicators (travel time to cities/ports)
#> 
#> ── Water & Soil: 
#> • freshwater: EarthEnv Freshwater environmental variables
#> • soil: Harmonized World Soil Database v2.0
#> 
#> ℹ Use `var_explore(source = "name", what = "variables")` to see variables for a specific source

# Show variables for WorldClim
var_explore(source = "worldclim", what = "variables")
#> 
#> ── Available variables for "worldclim": ──
#> 
#> ── Temperature: 
#> • tmin (synonyms: 'min temp'): Monthly minimum temperature
#> • tmax (synonyms: 'max temp'): Monthly maximum temperature
#> • tavg (synonyms: 'average temp'): Monthly average temperature
#> 
#> ── Precipitation: 
#> • prec (synonyms: 'precipitation', 'pr'): Monthly precipitation
#> 
#> ── Physical: 
#> • srad (synonyms: 'solar radiation'): Solar radiation
#> • wind (synonyms: 'wind speed'): Wind speed
#> • vapr (synonyms: 'water vapor'): Water vapor pressure
#> • elev (synonyms: 'elevation'): Elevation
#> 
#> ── Bioclimatic: 
#> • bio: All 19 bioclimatic variables (bio1-bio19)
#> • bio1, bio2, ..., bio19: Specific bioclimatic variables
#> 
#> 
#> ── Parameters: 
#> • years: '1970-2000' (historical), '2021-2040', '2041-2060', '2061-2080',
#> '2081-2100' (future)
#> • months: Numeric vector 1-12 for monthly data
#> • gcm: General Circulation Model for future projections
#> • ssp: Shared Socioeconomic Pathway for CMIP6 (e.g., '126', '585')
#> • rcp: Representative Concentration Pathway for CMIP5 (e.g., 26, 45, 85)

On this page
